title: Run budget (cron wall-clock ceiling)
description: runDueAiJobs never STARTS a job that can't finish its full per-job deadline before the function's wall-clock ceiling (FUNCTION_BUDGET_MS), so a late job is never hard-killed mid-run and left stuck.
rollbackSteps: Rollback: git revert -m 1 a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac (the PR #8 merge). Run-budget guard degrades gracefully (late jobs deferred to the next tick).
Revert the sync commit; behavior degrades gracefully (late jobs deferred to the next tick).
compatibilityNotes: Pure backend scheduling guard — no branding. Direct port; align FUNCTION_BUDGET_MS with the downstream cron maxDuration.

history.note: Registered from completed upstream worker hardening.

Landed in the Supercharged parity release PR #8 (8098d35 graceful worker deadline + run budget); bundle re-verified green (tsc/462 tests/117 ai/regression/build, flags OFF) and merged as a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac. Discovery→merged recorded as a bundled reconciliation transition (the parity foundation was validated and merged as one unit).
